Vardy, Hermansen, Stolarczyk - Leicester City injury update for Liverpool clash - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: Vardy picked up a knock in the loss to Wolves and needs to be assessed over the coming days to determine if he’s ready. Leicester City number one Mads Hermansen may not be fit to face Liverpool – and now Ruud van Nistelrooy could be without Jamie Vardy too.

arts.ttl: The Premier League 2024/25 Team of the Season So Far
arts.sum: Stars from Liverpool, Arsenal and Chelsea headline the Premier League's best so far this season,

Cody Gakpo has reflected on his two years at Liverpool. The winger made the move from PSV Eindhoven to Liverpool back in 2022 and has since netted 32 times for the club. On the Liverpool website, Gakpo reflected, “I’ve enjoyed every minute since I’ve been here.
